{{Quote|Your world will provide the fiercest fighters in the galaxy.|Bentilais san Sk'ar|<ref name="marvel54">[[Star Wars (1977) 54|''Star Wars'' (1977) 54]]</ref>}}
The '''Calian Confederacy''' was the government of [[Human/Legends|Humans]] on the remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shiva IV]]. The [[Calian]]s had a distinct warrior culture that sprung up far removed from the influence of the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and its fighters were renowned as some of the strongest in known space. The Calian Confederacy spent generations at war with the native [[T'Syriél]], whose [[Twelve Tribes of T'Syriél|Twelve Tribes]] were the Calians' most compelling rivals in the quest for dominance of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Aron Peacebringer]] brought an end to this era of combat, signing the [[Concordat of Peace]] with T'Syriél [[Demarch]] [[Kéral Longknife]].

==Description==
{{Quote|The battle madness of my people is a fearsome, fearful thing—a berserker rage that transforms one into a super-human, nigh-irresistible killing machine—as the Imperials I faced soon learned.|Aron Peacebringer|<ref name="marvel54" />}}
The [[Calian]] Confederacy was the name used by the civilization of [[Human/Legends|Humans]] that lived on the remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shiva IV]]. The Confederacy's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] was the throne city of [[Illyriaqüm]], but encompassed a number of outlying cities, including [[K'avor]]. The planet's Human population, known as Calians, had several distinctions from baseline Humans: a distinctive reddish-tan skin and uncommon physical strength, that was manifested in a storied warrior tradition.<ref name="marvel53" /> Warriors of the Calian Confederacy were considered some of the most formidable in known space, and were marked by their ability to enter a berzerker "[[Ryastraad|battle rage]]," where they became nearly unstoppable in the field of combat.<ref name="marvel54" />

The Calians' martial tradition was reflected in the Confederacy's hierarchy—the leader of the alliance was referred to as the [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]], and strength of arms was important in Calian society. Although Calians fought with simple weapons such as [[saber]]s,<ref name="marvel53" /> the Confederacy had access to much more advanced technology, including [[Calian flier|airspeeders]] and [[Calian aerial battleship|battleships]] that made up a significant [[Calian Fleet|fleet]].<ref name="marvel54" /> Culturally, the Calian Confederacy was quite distinct from other Human populations throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and its natives spoke a [[Calian language|language]] not registered in many [[Translatacomp/Legends|translatacomps]].<ref name="marvel53" />

==History==
{{Quote|In happier times—before our two races signed the Concordat of Peace—a warrior of the 12 Tribes would die rather than flee from you nightskins.|Kéral Longknife|<ref name="marvel53" />}}
[[File:TotallyMetalUmlautCity-MSW54.png|thumb|left|250px|Illyriaqüm, capital of the Calian Confederacy.]]
The Calian Confederacy rose to prominence on Shiva IV in the centuries preceding the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], but it was not alone. The Calians shared Shiva IV with another [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]], the [[T'Syriél]], whose [[Twelve Tribes of T'Syriél|Twelve Tribes]] posed the biggest threat to Calian hegemony over Shiva IV. The Calian Confederacy and the Twelve Tribes warred continuously for generations, until [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], when a warrior named [[Aron Peacebringer|Aron]]—who had slowly worked his way up the Calian heirarchy to the title of Warlord—forged a [[blood brother]]hood with T'Syriél [[Demarch]] [[Kéral Longknife]], and signed the [[Concordat of Peace]] that brought an end to the fighting. That peace, which brought Aron the name Aron Peacebringer, held for the next year, although many in the Confederacy were restless and missed the old days.<ref name="marvel53" />

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], communications between the capital of Illyriaqüm and the city of K'avor were suddenly severed, leading Peacebringer and Longknife to lead an expedition to the city to investigate—they found that the city had been obliterated by some kind of [[anti-matter bomb]].<ref name="marvel53" /> Soon after, the cause was revealed: a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|General]] named [[Bentilais san Sk'ar]] had allied with [[Ygal Delois]], the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of Peacebringer's guard, to conquer Shiva IV in the Empire's name and put Delois on the throne of the Calian Confederacy. Sk'ar and Delois attempted to detonate a similar bomb in Illyriaqüm, but their plans were foiled by Peacebringer, Longknife, and several [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]].<ref name="marvel54" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Calian Confederacy first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 53|''Star Wars'' (1977) 53]], written by [[Chris Claremont]] and released in [[1981]].<ref name="marvel53" />
